title: layers: GarbageCollect orphaned tar-split and data files
body:
GarbageCollect already removes driver layers that are not referenced in the layer store metadata, along with their tar-split and data files.

However, if the driver layer has already been removed (e.g. by Repair for ErrLayerUnaccounted layers), the orphaned tar-split and data files in the layer metadata directory are left behind.

Extend GarbageCollect to scan the layer metadata directory and remove any tar-split files or data directories that don't correspond to a known layer.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/container-libs/issues/721

<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: @mtrmac thanks for the review.  Comments addressed
